steps.title: See the general-to-specific shift
steps.content: The first sentence says many mushroom species contain phenolic compounds and names two compounds. The second sentence gives specific mushrooms in which Costa detected those compounds.

steps.title: Choose an example transition
steps.content: A and D signal contrast even though the sentences support each other. B signals cause and effect, but the detections illustrate the general claim rather than causing it. For example introduces specific instances. The answer is C.
